

AFFECT [[10008392000802964043]]
	TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT {signal ~&16404285191348324656&~}
		TRAVERSE [[254480451320573660]]#[[12920733285382795992]] > [[425121728314878811.8398643967132532355]]
			LOCATE AFTER ALL
			INSERT {~&383135108587212173&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&16404285191348324656&~()}
		END TRAVERSE
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[4354033616793223840]]
	TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatAddRedo();}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[18660494620083468]]
	TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatAddUndo();}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[15527434935107964598]]
	TRAVERSE [[458815733711863275]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatToolSel();}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[328605775881434202]]
	TRAVERSE [[458815733711863275]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatToolSel();}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

	TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatToolSel();}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[14657908675683620124]]
	TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatToolSel();}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT{
			signal floatAddRedo;
			signal floatAddUndo;
			signal floatToolSel;
			
			signal layersToggled;
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT



AFFECT [[15527434935107964598]]
	TRAVERSE [[458815733711863275]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
	property ~&197102514&~ resetFloatBarPositionFromPrimary
	property ~&197102514&~ presetSaveFromPrimary
	property ~&197088788&~ presetNumberFromPrimary: 1
	property ~&197102514&~ toolSelFromPrimary
	property ~&197102514&~ colSelFromPrimary
	property ~&197102514&~ thickSelFromPrimary
	
	property ~&197102514&~ layersToggled;

	~&428051690305612204&~{
		~&7083194890448&~: ~&6504254477&~
		function onPresetSave(){presetSaveFromPrimary();}
		function onPresetNumberChanged() {presetNumberFromPrimary = ~&6504254477&~.presetNumber; }
		function onResetFloatBarPosition(){resetFloatBarPositionFromPrimary();}
		
		function onThickSel(){thickSelFromPrimary();}
		function onToolSel(){toolSelFromPrimary(); }
		function onColSel(){colSelFromPrimary(); }
	}	}
	
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[7081645463424]]
		REPLACE [[8213680718767871380]] WITH {
		~&8213680718767871380&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&254547969329691981&~ === "") {
                    ~&7083121450889&~;
                }
                ~&214622607920&~ ~&12283807014411235127&~ = {
				~&233745975898428&~ : ~&6504254477&~, 
				~&15640708674084664669&~ : ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~, 
				~&6504337259&~ : ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~, 
				toolSelFromPrimary: () => {~&6504254477&~.toolSel(); },
				thickSelFromPrimary: () => {~&6504254477&~.thickSel();},
				colSelFromPrimary: () => {~&6504254477&~.colSel(); },
				resetFloatBarPositionFromPrimary: () => {~&6504254477&~.resetFloatBarPosition()},
				presetSaveFromPrimary: () => ~&6504254477&~.presetSave(),
				quickToolsFromPrimary: () => {~&6504254477&~.floatbarQuickk=!~&6504254477&~.floatbarQuickk;},
				switchPresetsPrimary: () => {~&6504254477&~.switchPresets()},
				layerFloatToggle: () => {~&6504254477&~.floatbarEnabledLayers = !~&6504254477&~.floatbarEnabledLayers},
				};
                ~&254547540655434182&~(~&254547969329691981&~, ~&12283807014411235127&~);
            }		 
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
	TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]
	LOCATE BEFORE ALL
	INSERT {
		signal resetFloatBarPosition
		signal presetSave

		signal toolSel
		signal thickSel
		signal colSel

		property ~&197102514&~ quickToolsFromPrimary
		property ~&197102514&~ switchPresetsPrimary
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]]![[12921149980962105220]] > [[14125623155555875541]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&15740235808997988493&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
           }
		QuickToolsToggle {}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]]![[12921149980962105220]] > [[254501558939456351]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&15740235808997988493&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
           }
		QuickToolsToggle {}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]#[[6504254477]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
	component QuickToolsToggle: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&233686564541414&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: quicktools
        ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
        ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
		~&477062473974076915&~: ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
						~&5972374&~: ~&233724020048228&~
						~&233744706647566&~: 0
						~&214646099849&~: 420
						~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
							~&214632764553&~: "QuickTools"
							~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"6452766492113250787&~
							~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
							~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&254542236275632405&~: {quickToolsFromPrimary();}
						}
						~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
							~&5972374&~: quickPresets
							~&214632764553&~: "Cycle Preset "
							~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"1888152859110688812&~
							~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
							~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&254542236275632405&~: {switchPresetsPrimary();}
						}
						~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
							~&5972374&~: quickPresetSave
							property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&6503664356&~: "Save Preset"
							property ~&7083178290016&~ baseIcon:~&"1888152859225879307&~
							property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&6504275384&~: "Saved Preset"
							property ~&7083178290016&~ saveIcon:~&"7424590230465671801&~
							~&8399601734642709923&~: baseIcon
							~&214632764553&~: ~&6503664356&~
							~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
							~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&254542253295368380&~: {~&6504254477&~.presetSave();
							quickPresetSave.~&214632764553&~ =~&6504275384&~;
							quickPresetSave.~&8399601734642709923&~=saveIcon;}
							~&8399894427451672267&~: {
							quickPresetSave.~&214632764553&~ =~&6503664356&~;
							quickPresetSave.~&8399601734642709923&~=baseIcon;}
						}
						~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
							~&214632764553&~: "Reset FloatBar"
							~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"8609871180810563551&~
							~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
							~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
							~&254542236275632405&~: {~&6504254477&~.resetFloatBarPosition()}
						}
    }
	}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
		TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]
		TRAVERSE [[425121728314878811.432643201877637292]]:[[233699089199698]] > [[7712155293725601]]#[[12920756540044148050]] > [[425121728314878811.432643201877711221]]
			LOCATE AFTER ALL
			INSERT
			{
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.toolSel(); }
			}
		END TRAVERSE

		TRAVERSE [[425121728314878811.432643201877637292]]:[[14525112301990522235]] > [[7712155293725601]] > [[425121728314878811.432643201877711221]]
			LOCATE AFTER ALL
			INSERT
			{
			~&383135108587212173&~:{~&6504254477&~.thickSel(); }
			}
		END TRAVERSE

		TRAVERSE [[425121728314878811.432643201877637292]]:[[254480449992140494]] > [[7712155293725601]]  > [[425121728314878811.2918947772029071675]]
			LOCATE AFTER ALL
			INSERT
			{
			~&383135108587212173&~: {~&6504254477&~.colSel(); }
			}
		END TRAVERSE
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
	



AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
	IMPORT [[233700934949963.233693781272506]] 1.0
	IMPORT [[7082573613689.5972775.7712892662059645]] 1.0
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7712892662059645]] 1.0
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
		LOCATE BEFORE [[6650786433440202278]]
		INSERT {
			signal resetFloatBarPosition
			signal presetSave

			signal toolSel
			signal colSel
			signal thickSel

			property ~&6503679477&~ floatbarEnabledLayers:~&214625660372&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ floatbarQuick:~&6504329801&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ floatbarQuickk:~&214625660372&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ onboarded: ~&6504329801&~
			property ~&197088788&~ presetNumber: 1
	
    }
		END TRAVERSE

END AFFECT

AFFECT [[530036626909737151]]
	TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]] 
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL 
		INSERT{
			property ~&197102514&~ layerFloatToggle
			signal layersToggled
		}
		TRAVERSE [[14125623155555875541]] > [[14125623155555875541]] 
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
				~&7713532151049593&~: 180
				~&214632764553&~: " Layers Floating Toolbar"
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"1888152859329366976&~
				~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
				~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
				~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: {
				
				~&6504254477&~.layersToggled() }	
			}
		}
		END TRAVERSE
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
		onLayersToggled: {~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.layersToggled()};
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]#[[8400129135001204805]] > [[7712155293725601]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["15827066597889961342]]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { ~&5972374&~: _editingTools }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT {
            function selectFloatEraser(~&214629689753&~) {
			    ~&197091758&~ ~&214624950331&~ = ~&6504117156&~;
				~&197085552&~ (~&197091758&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < _editingTools.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) {
					~&197091758&~ entryI = _editingTools.~&7082786471789&~(~&180978&~).~&6503936152&~;
					~&5972376&~ (entryI.~&496507535093048780&~ == ~&"7082627422347&~) {
						~&214624950331&~ = entryI;
						~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~(~&214624950331&~);
						~&214621519406&~;
					}
				}
				~&6504254477&~.~&5107434981825242642&~(~&214629689753&~);
				~&1318897126668497941&~(~&214624950331&~, 0);


            }
			function switchPresets(){
				~&6504254477&~.presetNumber = (~&6504254477&~.presetNumber == 3) ? 1 : (~&6504254477&~.presetNumber == 2 ? 3 : 2)	
			}
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[7713405014271992]]
        INSERT { signal floatEraser }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[5728643844066569666]]
    LOCATE AFTER ALL
    INSERT {
        onFloatEraser: {
            ~&233745975898428&~.selectEraser();
        }
    }
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
	IMPORT [[197080199.7083211239901]] 1.0 [[254477762679831355]]
	IMPORT [[233700934949963.7711528871884381]] 2.15
	IMPORT [[233700934949963.233693781272506]] 2.15
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
		LOCATE AFTER [[5972374]]
		INSERT {
			property ~&6503679477&~ shouldAnchorL: ~&214625660372&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ shouldAnchorLayers: ~&214625660372&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ timeOutBeforeMoving: ~&214625660372&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ timeOutBeforeMovingTools: ~&214625660372&~
			property ~&6503679477&~ collapsed:~&6504329801&~
		    property ~&6503679477&~ isQuickPenSelected: ~&214625660372&~
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]]
		TRAVERSE [[233704648923420]]
			LOCATE AFTER ALL
			INSERT {

				onLayersToggled: () => {~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("In docview triggered"); ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarEnabledLayers = !~&233745975898428&~.floatbarEnabledLayers}
				
				onResetFloatBarPosition: () => {
					~&7082882057113&~.moveToPosition((~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~-~&7082882057113&~.~&214646099849&~)/2,floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~);
				floatQuick.moveToPosition(~&233704648888572&~.~&180993&~+~&233704648888572&~.~&214646099849&~, 0);
				}
				onPresetSave: () => {floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile()}
				onToolSel: () => { floatQuick.addNewToolOnly("Tool", ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~);

				}

				onColSel: () => { floatQuick.addNewColourOnly("Colour", ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~);

				}
				onThickSel: () => { floatQuick.addNewThickOnly("Thick", ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~);

				}
				onFloatAddRedo: () => {floatQuick.addNewToolPlus(~&"6503093235&~, 91, 0) }
				onFloatAddUndo: () => {floatQuick.addNewToolPlus(~&"6503210847&~, 90, 0) }
				onFloatToolSel: () => {

				~&5972376&~ (isQuickPenSelected){
					floatQuick.quickTool = floatQuick.quickTool.~&7082656280847&~(
							function(~&6503936152&~) {
									~&7083121450889&~ !(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~)?(((~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) && 
										    (~&6503936152&~.~&197098340&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~) && 
										    (~&6503936152&~.~&496319807495899597&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~) &&	
											(~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~))):
											(~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ && ~&6503936152&~.~&6504337259&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ && ~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~));})
											floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
						}
				~&6503784146&~{
						~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~)){
						floatQuick.addNewTool(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~,~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~,~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~);
						floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
						} 
						~&6503784146&~ {
							floatQuick.addNewToolPlus(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~,~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~);
						}
				}
				
				
				}
			}
		END TRAVERSE
		LOCATE AFTER [[233704648923420]]
		INSERT {

	~&233704648908436&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: floatBarTips
		~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&233704648943284&~.~&254547519794454865&~
        ~&7083038346995&~: ~&233740803002070&~.~&7083038346995&~
        readonly property ~&197088788&~ ~&12920758939509216882&~: 112
        ~&254525457827593836&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(~&10054167583259537218&~.~&180993&~ + ~&12920758939509216882&~, ~&10054167583259537218&~.~&180994&~ + ~&12920758939509216882&~, ~&10054167583259537218&~.~&214646099849&~ - ~&12920758939509216882&~ * 2, ~&10054167583259537218&~.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&12920758939509216882&~ * 2)
        /*: Recommended character limit for translation: 20*/
        ~&233723474528951&~: ~&6504222003&~("Floating Toolbar")
	~&478136262235079021&~: ~&6504222003&~("Go to https://github.com/FouzR/xovi-extensions on instructions")
        ~&9019158794145941323&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
        ~&233740803002070&~: floatQuick
        ~&16400326245416126129&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&233704648943284&~.~&7712083094340350&~.~&214602223655&~
        ~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&233704648943284&~.~&7712083094340350&~.~&6502877684&~
        ~&16566225111713296750&~.~&197090674&~: "FloatingToolbarOnboarding"
        ~&499553103508155554&~: floatQuick.~&233748328658231&~
	~&17357098090295604850&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: floatingGithubProvider
                        ~&6504315758&~: "https://github.com/FouzR/xovi-extensions"
                    }

				~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~{
					~&233748328658231&~: collapsed
					~&254501108490678590&~ {
							~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
							~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
							~&233748328658231&~: timeOutBeforeMoving
					}
					~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~

					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"8609871973577012300&~
					~&254542236275632405&~: () => {

                ~&6504254477&~.~&6037617151381287454&~ = ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&214622607920&~ ~&5453223760590555046&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&14140055321554169705&~(~&6504254477&~.~&477346483278306569&~);
                ~&214622607920&~ ~&1536662069776115272&~ = ~&254503934078645080&~.~&6504032453&~().~&6503816650&~((~&180989&~) => ~&180989&~.~&7713012672362186&~ === ~&5453223760590555046&~) || ~&6504117156&~;

                ~&6504254477&~.~&482865290967253827&~.~&8400213107195236010&~(~&433854763438791459&~.~&7854348604917286446&~);

                            ~&5972376&~ (~&14140055315134608292&~) {

                                ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~?.~&7712934851008712&~?.~&6504337259&~ === ~&214587000859&~.~&7711571060833448&~) {
                                    ~&243560541951849292&~.~&1105490548312631253&~(~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&477346483278306569&~, ~&5453223760590555046&~);

                                    ~&5972376&~ (!~&14515220915283302886&~.~&12597697628854965581&~ && ~&8399622918519338138&~ !== ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~) {

                                        ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&8399622918519338138&~ ?

			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~ {
				~&5972374&~: floatQuick
				property ~&6503679477&~ currentFile: ~&254547437090201330&~.~&7713361680718652&~ || ~&254547437090201330&~.~&7712934851008712&~
				~&233748328658231&~: currentFile && ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuickk
				onCurrentFileChanged: loadQuickToolFile();
				~&214641137009&~: 1 
				~&504576868586410052&~: ~&214625660372&~
				~&6502604167&~.~&7082453764421&~: floatBarHandle4.~&6503754151&~.~&7082453764421&~
				property ~&6503679477&~ moveTool: ~&214625660372&~
				property ~&6504243117&~ originalX
				property ~&6504243117&~ originalY
				function moveToPosition(newX, ~&6504100076&~) {
					~&180993&~ = newX
					~&180994&~ = ~&6504100076&~
				}					
				property ~&197088788&~  presetState: ~&233745975898428&~.presetNumber
				property ~&6503679477&~ quickToolOn: ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuickk
				property ~&6503679477&~ layersOn: ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarEnabledLayers
				property ~&197102514&~ quickTool: []
				property ~&6504243117&~ total_width
				function addNewTool( ~&7713617204171177&~, toolId, toolRGB, toolPalette,toolThickness) {
					quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
						~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
						~&6504326343&~: toolId,
						~&197098340&~: toolRGB,
						~&496319807495899597&~: toolPalette,
						~&254549061334391125&~: toolThickness
					})
					quickToolChanged()
				}
				function addNewToolPlus( ~&7713617204171177&~, toolId, toolThickness) {
					quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
						~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
						~&6504326343&~: toolId,
						~&254549061334391125&~: toolThickness
					})
					quickToolChanged()
				}

				function addNewToolOnly(~&7713617204171177&~, toolId){
					quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
						~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
						~&6504326343&~: toolId,
					})
					quickToolChanged()
				}

				function addNewColourOnly(~&7713617204171177&~, toolRGB, toolPalette){
					quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
						~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
						~&197098340&~: toolRGB,
						~&496319807495899597&~: toolPalette
					})
					quickToolChanged()
				}

				function addNewThickOnly(~&7713617204171177&~, toolThickness){
					quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
						~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
						~&254549061334391125&~: toolThickness,
					})
					quickToolChanged()
				}
				function moveQuickTool(fromIndex, toIndex) {
					~&5972376&~ (fromIndex < 0 || fromIndex >= quickTool.~&7082886407723&~ || 
						toIndex < 0 || toIndex >= quickTool.~&7082886407723&~) {
						~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
					}
					~&214622607920&~ toolToMove = quickTool.~&7083173330345&~(fromIndex, 1)[0];
					quickTool.~&7083173330345&~(toIndex, 0, toolToMove);
					quickToolChanged();
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
				}
				function saveQuickToolFile() {
					~&197091758&~ xhr =                                   new                                  XMLHttpRequest();
					~&197091758&~ ~&6503736259&~ = {
						quickTool: quickTool,
						isfloatQuickActive: ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuickk,
						isLayersActive: ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarEnabledLayers,
						layersPositionX: ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~((~&7082882057113&~.~&180993&~-~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~)/~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~),
						layersPositionY: ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~((~&7082882057113&~.~&180994&~-~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~)/~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~),
						quickPositionX: ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~((floatQuick.~&180993&~-~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~)/~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~),
						quickPositionY: ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~((floatQuick.~&180994&~-~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~)/~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~)
					};
					~&197091758&~ dataStr = ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(~&6503736259&~);
					~&5972376&~ (presetState === 1){
					xhr.~&6504147419&~("PUT", "file:///home/root/quickTool.json");}
					~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (presetState === 2){
					xhr.~&6504147419&~("PUT", "file:///home/root/quickTool2.json");}
					~&6503784146&~ {xhr.~&6504147419&~("PUT", "file:///home/root/quickTool3.json");}
					xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
						~&5972376&~ (xhr.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
							~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("Save completed");
						}
					};
					xhr.~&6504279475&~(dataStr);
				}
				function loadQuickToolFile() {
					~&197091758&~ xhr =                                                                     new                                                                     XMLHttpRequest();
					~&5972376&~ (presetState===1){
					xhr.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/quickTool.json");}
					~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (presetState===2){
					xhr.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/quickTool2.json");}
					~&6503784146&~ {xhr.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/quickTool3.json");}
					xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
						~&5972376&~ (xhr.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
							try {
								~&197091758&~ ~&6503736259&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(xhr.responseText);
								quickTool = ~&6503736259&~.quickTool || [];
								~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuickk = ~&6503736259&~.isfloatQuickActive !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? ~&6503736259&~.isfloatQuickActive : ~&214625660372&~;
								~&233745975898428&~.floatbarEnabledLayers = ~&6503736259&~.isLayersActive !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? ~&6503736259&~.isLayersActive : ~&214625660372&~;
								floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6503736259&~.quickPositionX !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? ((1-~&6503736259&~.quickPositionX)*~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ ) : 0;
								floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6503736259&~.quickPositionY !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? ((1-~&6503736259&~.quickPositionY)*~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) : 0;
								~&7082882057113&~.~&180993&~ = ~&6503736259&~.layersPositionX !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? ((1- ~&6503736259&~.layersPositionX)*~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~) : 0;
								~&7082882057113&~.~&180994&~ = ~&6503736259&~.layersPositionY !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? ((1- ~&6503736259&~.layersPositionY)*~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) : 0;
							} catch (~&180974&~) {
								~&233724020023100&~.~&214625091795&~("Failed to parse file:", ~&180974&~);
								quickTool = [];
								~&233745975898428&~.onboarded = ~&214625660372&~;
							}
						}
					};
					xhr.~&6504279475&~();
				}
				~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: {
					loadQuickToolFile();
				}
				onPresetStateChanged: {loadQuickToolFile();} 


			~&8398044571386570029&~ {
				~&5972374&~: gridLayoutObject
				~&6503819969&~: (((floatQuick.~&180993&~<60)||(floatQuick.~&180993&~>0.83*~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~))&&(floatQuick.~&180994&~<0.91*~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~))? ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&454090249410509812&~:~&8398044571386570029&~.~&441360769245023669&~  
				~&3009194557570366524&~: 0
				~&8400036622101322246&~: 0

					~&5972374&~: floatBarHandleParent4
					~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
					~&6504337259&~: floatQuick.~&6504337259&~
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuick ? ~&"551690684902850748&~ : ~&"4663243347623906140&~
					~&254494525842443467&~ {
						~&5972374&~: floatBarHandle4
						~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~

						~&254542253295368380&~: () => { ~&8399923449641527401&~.~&499576305949137387&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
						floatQuick.originalX = floatQuick.~&180993&~;
						floatQuick.originalY = floatQuick.~&180994&~	;
						timeOutBeforeMovingTools=~&6504329801&~}
						property ~&197088788&~ snapThreshold: 30
						~&383135108587212173&~: () => { ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuick = !~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuick;}  
						~&8399894427451672267&~: () => { ~&8399923449641527401&~.~&499576305949137387&~ = ~&214625660372&~;timeOutBeforeMovingTools=~&214625660372&~;}
						~&12756630929064311461&~: {
							~&5972376&~ (~&6503754151&~.~&7082453764421&~) {
								~&197102514&~ centerX = floatQuick.~&180993&~ + floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ / 2
								~&197102514&~ centerY = floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ / 2
								~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180993&~ = 0
								}
								~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~ + floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~
								}
								~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(centerX - ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ / 2) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ / 2 - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ / 2
								}
								~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180994&~ = 0
								}
								~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ - floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~
								}
								~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(centerY - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2 - floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ / 2
								}
								~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~) < snapThreshold && 
									~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180993&~ = 0
									floatQuick.~&180994&~ = 0
								}

										 ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~
									floatQuick.~&180994&~ = 0
								}
								~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~) < snapThreshold && 
										 ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) < snapThreshold) {
									floatQuick.~&180993&~ = 0

										 ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) < snapThreshold) {

				~&7712155293725601&~ {
					~&5972374&~: ~&7713519083900865&~
					~&214634455770&~: floatQuick.quickTool
					~&254501108490678590&~ {
							~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
							~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
							~&233748328658231&~: timeOutBeforeMovingTools
							~&180995&~: 20
					}
					
					
					~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {						
						required property ~&197102514&~ ~&254539508423767444&~
						~&233748328658231&~:  ~&233745975898428&~.floatbarQuick
						~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
						~&6504337259&~: floatQuick.~&6504337259&~
					
						 readonly property ~&197102514&~ floatBar: floatQuick 
        	
						~&8399601734642709923&~: {
						~&214622607920&~ toolIcons = {
						15: ~&"12472390807386460417&~,
						17: ~&"1104274047935997048&~,
						18: ~&"9093988532389370539&~, 
						14: ~&"5204404160700829527&~,

						90: ~&"15094524446772182502&~,
						91: ~&"15094524446772064890&~
						};
						~&214622607920&~ thicknessIcon = {
								1: ~&"5729937688328008154&~,
								2: ~&"4902645675094746824&~,
								3: ~&"4620502977728752666&~
						};
						~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504337259&~ == "Thick"){~&7083121450889&~ thicknessIcon[~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~];}
						~&6503784146&~{~&7083121450889&~ toolIcons[~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~];}}
						~&6503165774&~{
							~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~:~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
							~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~:~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
							~&490371291080887915&~: 5
							~&214622605608&~: (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~) ? ((~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ && 
							~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&496319807495899597&~ && 
							~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&197098340&~ &&
